name: Transaction ledger summary success
description: Documented Sample Response for the Transaction Ledgers schema (lines 33296-33358). Two transaction journals: one accrual Product Buy with no points change, one Member Enrollment accrual with two pointsChange entries. JSON normalized to be valid (doc example omits a comma after externalTransactionNumber and has mismatched indentation on the second journal); all field names/values kept exactly as documented.
notes: METHOD/PATH/VERSION verified from the resource definition (lines 21738-21796): GET only, path /loyalty/programs/${programName}/members/${membershipNumber}/transaction-ledger-summary, Available version 58.0, Requires Chatter No. Response body listed in resource def as "Transaction Journal Summary Output" but NO schema by that exact name exists in the Response Bodies section. The matching documented schema is "Transaction Ledgers" (lines 33293-33372) whose description and field set exactly match this resource; I used its Sample Response for the success fixture. Property tables read: Transaction Ledgers (message/status/transactionJournalCount/transactionJournals[Transaction Details Output]; lines 33361-33372), Transaction Details Output (activityDate, externalTransactionNumber, journalSubTypeName, journalTypeName, pointsChange[Points Change Output], productCategoryName, productName, transactionAmount, transactionJournalId, transactionJournalNumber; lines 33144-33186), Points Change Output (changeInPoints, loyaltyMemberCurrency; lines 31183-31191). CAVEATS: (1) The doc Sample Response includes top-level externalTransactionNumber and per-journal additionalAttributes (fieldName/value) which are NOT in the Transaction Ledgers property table, additionalAttributes is the documented shape of the additionalTransactionJournalAttributes query param result (see Additional Transaction Journal Attributes Output schema). Kept them because they appear verbatim in the documented example. (2) changeInPoints is shown as a String in the JSON example ("-100.0") but typed Double in the property table; transactionAmount likewise shown as String. Kept the example's string values. (3) Raw doc JSON is malformed (missing comma after externalTransactionNumber, inconsistent brace indentation on 2nd journal), normalized to valid JSON without changing names/values. (4) NO error or empty-case example is documented for this resource, so only one success fixture was created. (5) transactionJournalNumber appears in the property table but not the example, so it is omitted from the fixture.
